title: Wireframe
description: A simple debugging mod that allows viewing of the wireframe.
body:
This is a simple mod that, currently, doesn't do anything other than viewing the world in a wireframe mode. This can be used when debugging for developers or for curious people (such as myself) to see how the world is rendered with your mods installed.

To use this mod:
- Press the "DELETE" key to open the configuration menu.

This menu allows you to select what you want to see in a wireframe mode!

_Note: This mod is subject to change and add more debugging tools._
